word: G2163 - εὔφημος - eúphēmos - yoo'-fay-mos - Of good report

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Of good report
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
sounding well; uttering words of good omen, speaking auspiciously
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G2095 and G5345; well spoken of, that is, reputable: - of good report.
